header.title: Create test entities
header.subtitle.simple: Creates a partner company + contact, a customer company + contact, and links them with a Parent Company association.
header.subtitle.advanced.both: Creates selected entities and links them with a Parent Company association.
auth.connectDescription: Sign in with your HubSpot account to get started. This grants the tool permission to create entities in your portal.
partner.title: Partner
customer.title: Customer
role.label: Role assigned to both contacts
hint.advancedMode: Need to create just one entity? Try Advanced mode.
poll.stage.waitingPartnerProvisioning: Waiting for Yorizon to provision the partner
poll.stage.waitingCustomerProvisioning: Waiting for Yorizon to provision the customer
poll.error.timeout: Yorizon didn't finish provisioning the company in time. The company was removed — please try again in a moment.
poll.error.creationFailed: Yorizon reported that company provisioning failed. The company was removed — please try again, and check the portal if this keeps happening.
poll.error.unexpectedState: Yorizon returned an unexpected provisioning state. The company was removed — please try again, and flag this if it keeps happening.
results.associationSkipped: Association: not created — single entity mode
error.sessionExpired: Your HubSpot session has expired. Please reconnect.
error.502: HubSpot is temporarily unreachable (502). This is on their end — please try again in a moment.
error.503: HubSpot is temporarily unavailable (503). Please try again shortly.
error.rateLimit: Too many requests — HubSpot rate limit hit. Please wait before retrying.
error.nonJson: HubSpot returned an unexpected response. Their API may be experiencing issues — try again shortly.
